title: Our Staff
aboutText: Founded in 1993, Music Place has been serving musicians for over 30 years. What started as a small shop has grown into one of the most trusted names in musical instruments and audio equipment.
Our team of experts includes professional musicians, sound engineers, and instrument technicians who are passionate about helping you find the perfect gear for your needs.
Whether you're a beginner looking for your first instrument or a professional upgrading your studio, we're here to help you every step of the way.

testimonial.quote: The staff at Music Place are incredibly knowledgeable. They helped me choose the right guitar for my skill level and even gave me tips on maintenance. Best music store in town!
testimonial.author: Kelley Webb
